content.body: would love to see https://github.com/tc39/test262/pull/5045 merged before the agenda deadline so i can go for stage 3 :-)
Richard and I had quite a time yesterday divvying up the high-priority tests that might block stage advancement 😄 maybe you can swap Richard for Error.stack vs one of iterator includes or chunking?
(I'd offer to swap immutable ArrayBuffer but it might be easier for me to keep it because I've already done a few rounds on it)
did we miss that one as being up for stage advancement?
